#真言[[律宗]]総本山で南都七大寺のひとつである[[真言律宗総本山西大寺]] #[[近鉄奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅で、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在する[[大和西大寺駅]] #高野山[[真言宗]]別格本山で毎年2月に行われる「会陽（裸祭）」で有名な[[金陵山西大寺]] #JR[[赤穂線]]の駅で、[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在する[[西大寺駅]]
{{msg:aimai}}

#真言[[律宗]]総本山で南都七大寺のひとつである[[真言律宗総本山西大寺]] #[[近鉄奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅で、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在する[[大和西大寺駅]] #[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在し、高野山[[真言宗]]別格本山の寺院で毎年2月に行われる「会陽（裸祭）」で有名な[[金陵山西大寺]] #JR[[赤穂線]]の駅で、[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在する[[西大寺駅]]

'''西大寺'''（さいだいじ） *[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在し、[[真言律宗]]総本山で[[南都七大寺]]の1つである[[西大寺 (奈良市)]] *[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在し、[[高野山真言宗]]別格本山で「会陽（裸祭）」で有名な[[西大寺 (岡山市寺院)]]。（金陵山西大寺） 地名 *[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]東部の一地域（旧西大寺市）である[[西大寺 (岡山市地名)]] 駅 *[[近鉄奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅で、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在する[[大和西大寺駅]] *JR[[赤穂線]]の駅で、[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在する[[西大寺駅]]

'''西大寺'''（さいだいじ） *[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在し、[[真言律宗]]総本山で[[南都七大寺]]の1つである[[西大寺 (奈良市)]] *[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在し、[[高野山真言宗]]別格本山で「会陽（裸祭）」で有名な[[西大寺 (岡山市寺院)]]。（金陵山西大寺） 地名 *[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]東部の一地域（旧西大寺市）である[[西大寺 (岡山市地名)]] *[[平安時代]]、[[平安京]]にあった寺。[[西寺]]

'''西大寺'''（さいだいじ） *寺院 **[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在し、[[真言律宗]]総本山で[[南都七大寺]]の1つである[[西大寺 (奈良市)]] **[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在し、[[高野山真言宗]]別格本山で「会陽（裸祭）」で有名な[[西大寺 (岡山市寺院)]]。（金陵山西大寺） **[[鹿児島県]][[肝属郡]][[東串良町]]に所在する寺院 - [[西大寺 (東串良町)]]。 **[[平安時代]]、[[平安京]]にあった寺。[[西寺]]
*地名 **[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]東部の一地域（旧西大寺市）である[[西大寺 (岡山市地名)]]
*駅 **[[近鉄奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅で、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在する[[大和西大寺駅]] **JR[[赤穂線]]の駅で、[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在する[[西大寺駅]]
{{aimai}}
== 関連項目 == *[[西大寺町]] [[category:曖昧さ回避|さいたいし]]

*寺院 **[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在し、[[真言律宗]]総本山で[[南都七大寺]]の1つである[[西大寺 (奈良市)]] **[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在し、[[高野山真言宗]]別格本山で「会陽（裸祭）」で有名な[[西大寺 (岡山市寺院)]] **[[富山県]][[高岡市]]に所在する寺院[[西大寺 (高岡市)]] **[[鹿児島県]][[肝属郡]][[東串良町]]に所在する[[西大寺 (東串良町)]] **[[平安時代]]、[[平安京]]にあった寺（[[西寺]]） *地名 **[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]東部の一地域（旧・西大寺市）である[[西大寺 (岡山市地名)]] *鉄道駅 **近鉄[[近鉄奈良線|奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅で、[[奈良県]][[奈良市]]に所在する[[大和西大寺駅]] **JR[[赤穂線]]の駅で、[[岡山県]][[岡山市]]に所在する[[西大寺駅]]

== 鉄道 == * [[西大寺駅]] - 岡山市東区にある[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[赤穂線]]の駅。 * [[大和西大寺駅]] - 奈良市にある近鉄[[近鉄奈良線|奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅。 * [[西大寺町停留場]] - 岡山市北区にある[[岡山電気軌道東山線]]の駅。 * [[新西大寺町筋停留場]] - 岡山市北区にある[[岡山電気軌道清輝橋線]]の駅。 * [[西大寺鉄道]] - かつて岡山県にあった鉄道会社。
== 施設 == * [[西大寺インターチェンジ]] - 岡山市東区にある[[岡山ブルーライン]]のインターチェンジ。 * [[西大寺郵便局]] - 岡山市東区にある[[郵便局]]。 * [[岡山県立西大寺高等学校]] - 岡山市東区にある[[高等学校]]。
== 関連項目 == * {{Prefix}}

'''Saidaiji Temple''' [[ja:%E8%A5%BF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AF%BA]] [[Category:last 150 tagging]] [[Category:redirect]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] '''Saidaiji''' (西大寺)
== Temples == * {{ill|Saidaiji (Nara)|ja|西大寺 (奈良市)}} - A temple in {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良県}}, {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}. The head temple of the {{ill|Shingon Risshu sect|ja|真言律宗}} and one of the {{ill|Seven Great Temples of Nanto|ja|南都七大寺}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)}} - A temple in {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市}}, {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|東区 (岡山市)}}. A special head temple of the {{ill|Koyasan Shingon-shu|ja|高野山真言宗}}, known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）}}." Currently, it includes {{ill|Kannon-in|ja|観音院}} and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)}} - A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha|ja|浄土真宗本願寺派}} temple in {{ill|Takaoka City|ja|高岡市}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)}} - A {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|ja|真言宗}} temple in {{ill|Higashikushira Town|ja|東串良町}}, {{ill|Kimotsuki District|ja|肝属郡}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Saiji (Kyoto)|ja|西寺}} - A former temple in {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, also known as {{ill|Saiji|ja|西寺}}.
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区}}: * {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. * A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域}}, {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村}} - Disambiguation page.
== Railways == * {{ill|Saidaiji Station|ja|西大寺駅}} - A station on the {{ill|Ako Line|ja|赤穂線}} of {{ill|JR West|ja|西日本旅客鉄道}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Yamato-Saidaiji Station|ja|大和西大寺駅}} - A station in Nara City, served by the {{ill|Kintetsu Nara Line|ja|近鉄奈良線}}, {{ill|Kintetsu Kyoto Line|ja|近鉄京都線}}, and {{ill|Kintetsu Kashihara Line|ja|近鉄橿原線}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|ja|西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja|岡山電気軌道東山線}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|ja|新西大寺町筋停留場}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Seikibashi Line|ja|岡山電気軌道清輝橋線}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Railway|ja|西大寺鉄道}} - A former railway company in Okayama Prefecture.
== Facilities == * {{ill|Saidaiji Interchange|ja|西大寺インターチェンジ}} - An interchange on the {{ill|Okayama Blue Line|ja|岡山ブルーライン}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Post Office|ja|西大寺郵便局}} - A post office in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|ja|岡山県立西大寺高等学校}} - A high school in Higashi-ku, Okayama.
== Related Pages == * {{ill|Prefix|ja|Prefix}}

'''Saidaiji Temple''' [[ja:%E8%A5%BF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AF%BA]] [[Category:last 150 tagging]] [[Category:redirect]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] '''Saidaiji''' (西大寺)
== Temples == * {{ill|Saidaiji (Nara)|ja|西大寺 (奈良市)}} - A temple in {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良県}}, {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}. The head temple of the {{ill|Shingon Risshu sect|ja|真言律宗}} and one of the {{ill|Seven Great Temples of Nanto|ja|南都七大寺}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)}} - A temple in {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市}}, {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|東区 (岡山市)}}. A special head temple of the {{ill|Koyasan Shingon-shu|ja|高野山真言宗}}, known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）}}." Currently, it includes {{ill|Kannon-in|ja|観音院}} and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)}} - A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha|ja|浄土真宗本願寺派}} temple in {{ill|Takaoka City|ja|高岡市}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)}} - A {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|ja|真言宗}} temple in {{ill|Higashikushira Town|ja|東串良町}}, {{ill|Kimotsuki District|ja|肝属郡}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Saiji (Kyoto)|ja|西寺}} - A former temple in {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, also known as {{ill|Saiji|ja|西寺}}.
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区}}: * {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. * A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域}}, {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村}} - Disambiguation page.
== Railways == * {{ill|Saidaiji Station|ja|西大寺駅}} - A station on the {{ill|Ako Line|ja|赤穂線}} of {{ill|JR West|ja|西日本旅客鉄道}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Yamato-Saidaiji Station|ja|大和西大寺駅}} - A station in Nara City, served by the {{ill|Kintetsu Nara Line|ja|近鉄奈良線}}, {{ill|Kintetsu Kyoto Line|ja|近鉄京都線}}, and {{ill|Kintetsu Kashihara Line|ja|近鉄橿原線}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|ja|西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja|岡山電気軌道東山線}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|ja|新西大寺町筋停留場}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Seikibashi Line|ja|岡山電気軌道清輝橋線}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Railway|ja|西大寺鉄道}} - A former railway company in Okayama Prefecture.
== Facilities == * {{ill|Saidaiji Interchange|ja|西大寺インターチェンジ}} - An interchange on the {{ill|Okayama Blue Line|ja|岡山ブルーライン}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Post Office|ja|西大寺郵便局}} - A post office in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|ja|岡山県立西大寺高等学校}} - A high school in Higashi-ku, Okayama.
== Related Pages == * {{ill|Prefix|ja|Prefix}}
{{ill|Disambiguation|ja|曖昧さ回避}}

{{TOCright}} '''西大寺'''（さいだいじ）
== 寺院 == * [[西大寺 (奈良市)]] - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]にある寺院。[[真言律宗]]総本山で[[南都七大寺]]の1つ。 * [[西大寺 (岡山市)]] - [[岡山県]][[岡山市]][[東区 (岡山市)|東区]]にある寺院。[[高野山真言宗]]別格本山で「会陽（裸祭）」で知られる。現在は'''観音院'''と'''普門坊円満院'''がある。 * [[西大寺 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]にある[[浄土真宗本願寺派]]の寺院。 * [[西大寺 (東串良町)]] - [[鹿児島県]][[肝属郡]][[東串良町]]にある[[真言宗]]の寺院。 * [[西寺|西大寺 (京都市)]] - [[京都市]]にあった寺院。[[西寺]]。
== 地名 == * 岡山市東区の地名 ** [[西大寺地域]] - 岡山市東区本庁管轄域。広義の西大寺。旧'''西大寺市'''。 ** [[西大寺 (学区)]] - 上記にある地域。上記の中心市街地を含む。狭義の西大寺。 ** 上記にある大字。 ⇒ [[西大寺 (学区)]] * 奈良市伏見地域の地名。 * [[西大寺市]] - かつて岡山県にあった自治体。 * [[西大寺町]] - かつて岡山県にあった自治体。 ** [[西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ * [[西大寺村]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ
== 鉄道 == * [[西大寺駅]] - 岡山市東区にある[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[赤穂線]]の駅。 * [[大和西大寺駅]] - 奈良市にある近鉄[[近鉄奈良線|奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅。 * [[西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場]] - 岡山市北区にある[[岡山電気軌道東山線]]の電停。 * [[新西大寺町筋停留場]] - 岡山市北区にある[[岡山電気軌道清輝橋線]]の電停。 * 西大寺駅 - 岡山市中区にあるJR[[山陽本線]]・赤穂線[[東岡山駅]]の旧称。 * [[西大寺鉄道]] - かつて岡山県にあった鉄道会社。
== 施設 == * [[西大寺インターチェンジ]] - 岡山市東区にある[[岡山ブルーライン]]のインターチェンジ。 * [[西大寺郵便局]] - 岡山市東区にある[[郵便局]]。 * [[岡山県立西大寺高等学校]] - 岡山市東区にある[[高等学校]]。
== 関連項目 == * {{Prefix}}
{{Aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:さいたいし}} [[Category:同名の寺]]

{{TOCright}} '''西大寺'''（さいだいじ）
== 寺院 == * [[西大寺 (奈良市)]] - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]にある寺院。[[真言律宗]]総本山で[[南都七大寺]]の1つ。 * [[西大寺 (岡山市)]] - [[岡山県]][[岡山市]][[東区 (岡山市)|東区]]にある寺院。[[高野山真言宗]]別格本山で「会陽（裸祭）」で知られる。現在は'''観音院'''と'''普門坊円満院'''がある。 * [[西大寺 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]にある[[浄土真宗本願寺派]]の寺院。 * [[西大寺 (東串良町)]] - [[鹿児島県]][[肝属郡]][[東串良町]]にある[[真言宗]]の寺院。 * [[西寺|西大寺 (京都市)]] - [[京都市]]にあった寺院。[[西寺]]。
== 地名 == * 岡山市東区の地名 ** [[西大寺地域]] - 岡山市東区本庁管轄域。広義の西大寺。旧'''西大寺市'''。 ** [[西大寺 (学区)]] - 上記にある地域。上記の中心市街地を含む。狭義の西大寺。 ** 上記にある大字。 ⇒ [[西大寺 (学区)]] * 奈良市伏見地域の地名。 * [[西大寺市]] - かつて岡山県にあった自治体。 * [[西大寺町]] - かつて岡山県にあった自治体。 ** [[西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ * [[西大寺村]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ
== 鉄道 == * [[西大寺駅]] - 岡山市東区にある[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[赤穂線]]の駅。 * [[大和西大寺駅]] - 奈良市にある近鉄[[近鉄奈良線|奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅。 * [[西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場]] - 岡山市北区にある[[岡山電気軌道東山線]]の電停。 * [[新西大寺町筋停留場]] - 岡山市北区にある[[岡山電気軌道清輝橋線]]の電停。 * 西大寺駅 - 岡山市中区にあるJR[[山陽本線]]・赤穂線[[東岡山駅]]の旧称。 * [[西大寺鉄道]] - かつて岡山県にあった鉄道会社。 * [[西大寺鉄道#駅一覧|西大寺市駅]] - かつて岡山県西大寺市（現在の岡山市）にあった西大寺鉄道線の駅。
== 施設 == * [[西大寺インターチェンジ]] - 岡山市東区にある[[岡山ブルーライン]]のインターチェンジ。 * [[西大寺郵便局]] - 岡山市東区にある[[郵便局]]。 * [[岡山県立西大寺高等学校]] - 岡山市東区にある[[高等学校]]。
== 関連項目 == * {{Prefix}}
{{Aimai}}

'''Saidaiji Temple''' [[ja:%E8%A5%BF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AF%BA]] [[Category:last 150 tagging]] [[Category:redirect]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] '''Saidaiji''' (西大寺)
== Temples == * {{ill|Saidaiji (Nara)|ja|西大寺 (奈良市)}} - A temple in {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良県}}, {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}. The head temple of the {{ill|Shingon Risshu sect|ja|真言律宗}} and one of the {{ill|Seven Great Temples of Nanto|ja|南都七大寺}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)}} - A temple in {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市}}, {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|東区 (岡山市)}}. A special head temple of the {{ill|Koyasan Shingon-shu|ja|高野山真言宗}}, known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）}}." Currently, it includes {{ill|Kannon-in|ja|観音院}} and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)}} - A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha|ja|浄土真宗本願寺派}} temple in {{ill|Takaoka City|ja|高岡市}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)}} - A {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|ja|真言宗}} temple in {{ill|Higashikushira Town|ja|東串良町}}, {{ill|Kimotsuki District|ja|肝属郡}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Saiji (Kyoto)|ja|西寺}} - A former temple in {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, also known as {{ill|Saiji|ja|西寺}}.
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区}}: * {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. * A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域}}, {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村}} - Disambiguation page.
== Railways == * {{ill|Saidaiji Station|ja|西大寺駅}} - A station on the {{ill|Ako Line|ja|赤穂線}} of {{ill|JR West|ja|西日本旅客鉄道}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Yamato-Saidaiji Station|ja|大和西大寺駅}} - A station in Nara City, served by the {{ill|Kintetsu Nara Line|ja|近鉄奈良線}}, {{ill|Kintetsu Kyoto Line|ja|近鉄京都線}}, and {{ill|Kintetsu Kashihara Line|ja|近鉄橿原線}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|ja|西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja|岡山電気軌道東山線}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|ja|新西大寺町筋停留場}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Seikibashi Line|ja|岡山電気軌道清輝橋線}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Railway|ja|西大寺鉄道}} - A former railway company in Okayama Prefecture.
== Facilities == * {{ill|Saidaiji Interchange|ja|西大寺インターチェンジ}} - An interchange on the {{ill|Okayama Blue Line|ja|岡山ブルーライン}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Post Office|ja|西大寺郵便局}} - A post office in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|ja|岡山県立西大寺高等学校}} - A high school in Higashi-ku, Okayama.
== Related Pages == * {{ill|Prefix|ja|Prefix}}
{{ill|Disambiguation|ja|曖昧さ回避}}

'''Saidaiji Temple''' [[ja:%E8%A5%BF%E5%A4%A7%E5%AF%BA]] [[Category:last 150 tagging]] [[Category:11]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] [[en:Saidaiji Temple]] '''Saidaiji''' (西大寺)
== Temples == * {{ill|Saidaiji (Nara)|ja|西大寺 (奈良市)}} - A temple in {{ill|Nara|ja|奈良県}}, {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}. The head temple of the {{ill|Shingon Risshu sect|ja|真言律宗}} and one of the {{ill|Seven Great Temples of Nanto|ja|南都七大寺}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)}} - A temple in {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, {{ill|Okayama City|ja|岡山市}}, {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|東区 (岡山市)}}. A special head temple of the {{ill|Koyasan Shingon-shu|ja|高野山真言宗}}, known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）}}." Currently, it includes {{ill|Kannon-in|ja|観音院}} and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)}} - A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha|ja|浄土真宗本願寺派}} temple in {{ill|Takaoka City|ja|高岡市}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)}} - A {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|ja|真言宗}} temple in {{ill|Higashikushira Town|ja|東串良町}}, {{ill|Kimotsuki District|ja|肝属郡}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|ja|鹿児島県}}. * {{ill|Saiji (Kyoto)|ja|西寺}} - A former temple in {{ill|Kyoto City|ja|京都市}}, also known as {{ill|Saiji|ja|西寺}}.
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区}}: * {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. * A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域}}, {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村}} - Disambiguation page.
== Railways == * {{ill|Saidaiji Station|ja|西大寺駅}} - A station on the {{ill|Ako Line|ja|赤穂線}} of {{ill|JR West|ja|西日本旅客鉄道}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Yamato-Saidaiji Station|ja|大和西大寺駅}} - A station in Nara City, served by the {{ill|Kintetsu Nara Line|ja|近鉄奈良線}}, {{ill|Kintetsu Kyoto Line|ja|近鉄京都線}}, and {{ill|Kintetsu Kashihara Line|ja|近鉄橿原線}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|ja|西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja|岡山電気軌道東山線}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|ja|新西大寺町筋停留場}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Seikibashi Line|ja|岡山電気軌道清輝橋線}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Railway|ja|西大寺鉄道}} - A former railway company in Okayama Prefecture.
== Facilities == * {{ill|Saidaiji Interchange|ja|西大寺インターチェンジ}} - An interchange on the {{ill|Okayama Blue Line|ja|岡山ブルーライン}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Post Office|ja|西大寺郵便局}} - A post office in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|ja|岡山県立西大寺高等学校}} - A high school in Higashi-ku, Okayama.
== Related Pages == * {{ill|Prefix|ja|Prefix}}

revision.text:
{{TOCright}} '''西大寺'''（さいだいじ）
== 寺院 == * [[西大寺 (奈良市)]] - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]にある寺院。[[真言律宗]]総本山で[[南都七大寺]]の1つ。 * [[西大寺 (岡山市)]] - [[岡山県]][[岡山市]][[東区 (岡山市)|東区]]にある寺院。[[高野山真言宗]]別格本山で「会陽（裸祭）」で知られる。現在は'''観音院'''と'''普門坊円満院'''がある。 * [[西大寺 (高岡市)]] - [[富山県]][[高岡市]]にある[[浄土真宗本願寺派]]の寺院。 * [[西大寺 (東串良町)]] - [[鹿児島県]][[肝属郡]][[東串良町]]にある[[真言宗]]の寺院。 * [[西寺|西大寺 (京都市)]] - [[京都市]]にあった寺院。[[西寺]]。
== 地名 == * 岡山市東区の地名 ** [[西大寺地域]] - 岡山市東区本庁管轄域。広義の西大寺。旧'''西大寺市'''。 ** [[西大寺 (学区)]] - 上記にある地域。上記の中心市街地を含む。狭義の西大寺。 ** 上記にある大字。 ⇒ [[西大寺 (学区)]] * 奈良市伏見地域の地名。 * [[西大寺市]] - かつて岡山県にあった自治体。 * [[西大寺町]] - かつて岡山県にあった自治体。 ** [[西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ * [[西大寺村]] - 曖昧さ回避ページ
== 鉄道 == * [[西大寺駅]] - 岡山市東区にある[[西日本旅客鉄道|JR]][[赤穂線]]の駅。 * [[大和西大寺駅]] - 奈良市にある近鉄[[近鉄奈良線|奈良線]]、[[近鉄京都線|京都線]]、[[近鉄橿原線|橿原線]]の駅。 * [[西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場]] - 岡山市北区にある[[岡山電気軌道東山線]]の電停。 * [[新西大寺町筋停留場]] - 岡山市北区にある[[岡山電気軌道清輝橋線]]の電停。 * 西大寺駅 - 岡山市中区にあるJR[[山陽本線]]・赤穂線[[東岡山駅]]の旧称。 * [[西大寺鉄道]] - かつて岡山県にあった鉄道会社。 * [[西大寺鉄道#駅一覧|西大寺市駅]] - かつて岡山県西大寺市（現在の岡山市）にあった西大寺鉄道線の駅。
== 施設 == * [[西大寺インターチェンジ]] - 岡山市東区にある[[岡山ブルーライン]]のインターチェンジ。 * [[西大寺郵便局]] - 岡山市東区にある[[郵便局]]。 * [[岡山県立西大寺高等学校]] - 岡山市東区にある[[高等学校]]。
== 関連項目 == * {{Prefix}}
{{Aimai}}
{{デフォルトソート:さいたいし}} [[Category:同名の寺]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:西大寺]][[zh:西大寺]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q81436]] Wikidata name: Saidaiji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:00, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Saidaiji Temple''' '''Saidaiji''' (西大寺)
== Temples == * [[:en:Saidai-ji|Saidaiji (Nara)]] - A temple in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara]], [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. The head temple of the [[:en:Shingon Risshu|Shingon Risshu sect]] and one of the [[:en:Nanto Shichi Daiji|Seven Great Temples of Nanto]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|qq=|1=Saidai-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in [[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], [[:en:Higashi-ku, Okayama|Higashi-ku, Okayama]]. A special head temple of the [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon-shu]], known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes [[:en:Kannon-in|Kannon-in]] and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha]] temple in [[:en:Takaoka, Toyama|Takaoka City]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon Buddhism]] temple in [[:en:Higashikushira, Kagoshima|Higashikushira Town]], [[:en:Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|Kimotsuki District]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji (Kyoto)]] - A former temple in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], also known as [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji]].
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-ku, Okayama|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東区 (岡山市)|1=Higashi-ku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855491}}: ** {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Area|qq=|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627551}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|qq=|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}}. ** {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|qq=|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. ** A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|qq=|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Area (Nara City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|qq=|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town|qq=|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627559}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|qq=|1=Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q23998042}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Village|qq=|1=Saidaiji Village|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627556}} - Disambiguation page.
== Railways == * [[:en:Saidaiji Station|Saidaiji Station]] - A station on the [[:en:Akō Line|Ako Line]] of [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]], located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * [[:en:Yamato-Saidaiji Station|Yamato-Saidaiji Station]] - A station in Nara City, served by the [[:en:Nara Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Nara Line]], [[:en:Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Kyoto Line]], and [[:en:Kashihara Line|Kintetsu Kashihara Line]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|ja|西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|qq=|1=Saidaiji-cho Okayama Arts and Crafts Theater Harenowa-mae Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627558}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja|岡山電気軌道東山線|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岡山電気軌道東山本線|1=Higashiyama Main Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472771}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|ja|新西大寺町筋停留場|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|qq=|1=Shin-saidaizi-cho-suzi Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504058}} - A tram stop on the [[:en:Seikibashi Line|Okayama Electric Tramway Seikibashi Line]] in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Railway|ja|西大寺鉄道|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Railway|qq=|1=Saidaiji Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627561}} - A former railway company in Okayama Prefecture.
== Facilities == * {{ill|Saidaiji Interchange|ja|西大寺インターチェンジ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Interchange|qq=|1=Okayama Blue Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472058}} - An interchange on the {{ill|Okayama Blue Line|ja|岡山ブルーライン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Blue Line|qq=|1=Okayama Blue Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472058}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Post Office|ja|西大寺郵便局|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Post Office|qq=|1=Saidaiji Post Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627560}} - A post office in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|ja|岡山県立西大寺高等学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|qq=|1=Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472340}} - A high school in Higashi-ku, Okayama.

== Temples == * [[:en:Saidai-ji|Saidaiji (Nara)]] - A temple in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara]], [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. The head temple of the [[:en:Shingon Risshu|Shingon Risshu sect]] and one of the [[:en:Nanto Shichi Daiji|Seven Great Temples of Nanto]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|1=Saidai-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in [[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], [[:en:Higashi-ku, Okayama|Higashi-ku, Okayama]]. A special head temple of the [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon-shu]], known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes [[:en:Kannon-in|Kannon-in]] and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha]] temple in [[:en:Takaoka, Toyama|Takaoka City]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon Buddhism]] temple in [[:en:Higashikushira, Kagoshima|Higashikushira Town]], [[:en:Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|Kimotsuki District]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji (Kyoto)]] - A former temple in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], also known as [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji]].
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東区 (岡山市)|1=Higashi-ku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855491}}: ** {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Area|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627551}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. == Temples == * [[:en:Saidai-ji|Saidaiji (Nara)]] - A temple in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara]], [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. The head temple of the [[:en:Shingon Risshu|Shingon Risshu sect]] and one of the [[:en:Nanto Shichi Daiji|Seven Great Temples of Nanto]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|1=Saidai-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in [[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], [[:en:Higashi-ku, Okayama|Higashi-ku, Okayama]]. A special head temple of the [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon-shu]], known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes [[:en:Kannon-in|Kannon-in]] and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha]] temple in [[:en:Takaoka, Toyama|Takaoka City]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon Buddhism]] temple in [[:en:Higashikushira, Kagoshima|Higashikushira Town]], [[:en:Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|Kimotsuki District]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji (Kyoto)]] - A former temple in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], also known as [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji]].
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東区 (岡山市)|1=Higashi-ku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855491}}: ** {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Area|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627551}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. == Temples == * [[:en:Saidai-ji|Saidaiji (Nara)]] - A temple in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara]], [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. The head temple of the [[:en:Shingon Risshu|Shingon Risshu sect]] and one of the [[:en:Nanto Shichi Daiji|Seven Great Temples of Nanto]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|1=Saidai-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in [[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], [[:en:Higashi-ku, Okayama|Higashi-ku, Okayama]]. A special head temple of the [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon-shu]], known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes [[:en:Kannon-in|Kannon-in]] and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha]] temple in [[:en:Takaoka, Toyama|Takaoka City]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon Buddhism]] temple in [[:en:Higashikushira, Kagoshima|Higashikushira Town]], [[:en:Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|Kimotsuki District]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji (Kyoto)]] - A former temple in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], also known as [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji]].
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東区 (岡山市)|1=Higashi-ku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855491}}: ** {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Area|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627551}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}}. ** {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. ** A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627559}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|1=Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q23998042}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Village|1=Saidaiji Village|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627556}} - Disambiguation page.
== Railways == * [[:en:Saidaiji Station|Saidaiji Station]] - A station on the [[:en:Akō Line|Ako Line]] of [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]], located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * [[:en:Yamato-Saidaiji Station|Yamato-Saidaiji Station]] - A station in Nara City, served by the [[:en:Nara Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Nara Line]], [[:en:Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Kyoto Line]], and [[:en:Kashihara Line|Kintetsu Kashihara Line]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|ja|西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|1=Saidaiji-cho Okayama Arts and Crafts Theater Harenowa-mae Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627558}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja|岡山電気軌道東山線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岡山電気軌道東山本線|1=Higashiyama Main Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472771}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|ja|新西大寺町筋停留場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|1=Shin-saidaizi-cho-suzi Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504058}} - A tram stop on the [[:en:Seikibashi Line|Okayama Electric Tramway Seikibashi Line]] in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Railway|ja|西大寺鉄道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Railway|1=Saidaiji Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627561}} - A former railway company in Okayama Prefecture.
== Facilities == * {{ill|Saidaiji Interchange|ja|西大寺インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Interchange|1=Okayama Blue Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472058}} - An interchange on the {{ill|Okayama Blue Line|ja|岡山ブルーライン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Blue Line|1=Okayama Blue Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472058}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Post Office|ja|西大寺郵便局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Post Office|1=Saidaiji Post Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627560}} - A post office in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|ja|岡山県立西大寺高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|1=Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472340}} - A high school in Higashi-ku, Okayama.
== Related Pages == * {{ill|Prefix|ja|Prefix|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prefix|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 接頭辞|1=prefix|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134830}}

== Temples == * [[:en:Saidai-ji|Saidaiji (Nara)]] - A temple in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara]], [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. The head temple of the [[:en:Shingon Risshu|Shingon Risshu sect]] and one of the [[:en:Nanto Shichi Daiji|Seven Great Temples of Nanto]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|1=Saidai-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in [[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], [[:en:Higashi-ku, Okayama|Higashi-ku, Okayama]]. A special head temple of the [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon-shu]], known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes [[:en:Kannon-in|Kannon-in]] and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha]] temple in [[:en:Takaoka, Toyama|Takaoka City]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon Buddhism]] temple in [[:en:Higashikushira, Kagoshima|Higashikushira Town]], [[:en:Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|Kimotsuki District]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji (Kyoto)]] - A former temple in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], also known as [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji]].

A special head temple of the [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon-shu]], known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes [[:en:Kannon-in|Kannon-in]] and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha]] temple in [[:en:Takaoka, Toyama|Takaoka City]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon Buddhism]] temple in [[:en:Higashikushira, Kagoshima|Higashikushira Town]], [[:en:Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|Kimotsuki District]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji (Kyoto)]] - A former temple in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], also known as [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji]].
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東区 (岡山市)|1=Higashi-ku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855491}}: ** {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Area|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627551}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}}. ** {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. ** A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627559}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|1=Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q23998042}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Village|1=Saidaiji Village|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627556}} - Disambiguation page.
== Railways == * [[:en:Saidaiji Station|Saidaiji Station]] - A station on the [[:en:Akō Line|Ako Line]] of [[:en:West Japan Railway Company|JR West]], located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * [[:en:Yamato-Saidaiji Station|Yamato-Saidaiji Station]] - A station in Nara City, served by the [[:en:Nara Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Nara Line]], [[:en:Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)|Kintetsu Kyoto Line]], and [[:en:Kashihara Line|Kintetsu Kashihara Line]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|ja|西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|1=Saidaiji-cho Okayama Arts and Crafts Theater Harenowa-mae Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627558}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja|岡山電気軌道東山線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岡山電気軌道東山本線|1=Higashiyama Main Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472771}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|ja|新西大寺町筋停留場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|1=Shin-saidaizi-cho-suzi Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504058}} - A tram stop on the [[:en:Seikibashi Line|Okayama Electric Tramway Seikibashi Line]] in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Railway|ja|西大寺鉄道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Railway|1=Saidaiji Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627561}} - A former railway company in Okayama Prefecture.

== Temples == * [[:en:Saidai-ji|Saidaiji (Nara)]] - A temple in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara]], [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]]. The head temple of the [[:en:Shingon Risshu|Shingon Risshu sect]] and one of the [[:en:Nanto Shichi Daiji|Seven Great Temples of Nanto]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|1=Saidai-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in [[:en:Okayama Prefecture|Okayama Prefecture]], [[:en:Okayama|Okayama City]], [[:en:Higashi-ku, Okayama|Higashi-ku, Okayama]]. A special head temple of the [[:en:Kōyasan Shingon-shū|Koyasan Shingon-shu]], known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes [[:en:Kannon-in|Kannon-in]] and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha]] temple in [[:en:Takaoka, Toyama|Takaoka City]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A [[:en:Shingon Buddhism|Shingon Buddhism]] temple in [[:en:Higashikushira, Kagoshima|Higashikushira Town]], [[:en:Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|Kimotsuki District]], [[:en:Kagoshima Prefecture|Kagoshima Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji (Kyoto)]] - A former temple in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto City]], also known as [[:en:Sai-ji|Saiji]].

The head temple of the {{ill|Shingon Risshu|en|Shingon Risshu|WD=Q580527|lt=Shingon Risshu sect}} and one of the {{ill|Nanto Shichi Daiji|en|Nanto Shichi Daiji|WD=Q1131210|lt=Seven Great Temples of Nanto}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|1=Saidai-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|WD=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama City}}, {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|en|Higashi-ku, Okayama|WD=Q855491|lt=Higashi-ku, Okayama}}. A special head temple of the {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357|lt=Koyasan Shingon-shu}}, known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes {{ill|Kannon-in|en|Kannon-in|WD=Q3192708|lt=Kannon-in}} and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|en|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|WD=Q10389102|lt=Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha}} temple in {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|en|Takaoka, Toyama|WD=Q502988|lt=Takaoka City}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|en|Shingon Buddhism|WD=Q550182|lt=Shingon Buddhism}} temple in {{ill|Higashikushira, Kagoshima|en|Higashikushira, Kagoshima|WD=Q1206619|lt=Higashikushira Town}}, {{ill|Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|en|Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|WD=Q1043823|lt=Kimotsuki District}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|en|Kagoshima Prefecture|WD=Q15701|lt=Kagoshima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Sai-ji|en|Sai-ji|WD=Q135714|lt=Saiji (Kyoto)}} - A former temple in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City}}, also known as {{ill|Sai-ji|en|Sai-ji|WD=Q135714|lt=Saiji}}.
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東区 (岡山市)|1=Higashi-ku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855491}}: ** {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Area|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627551}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}}. ** {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. ** A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627559}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|1=Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q23998042}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Village|1=Saidaiji Village|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627556}} - Disambiguation page.
== Railways == * {{ill|Saidaiji Station|en|Saidaiji Station|WD=Q3661905|lt=Saidaiji Station}} - A station on the {{ill|Akō Line|en|Akō Line|WD=Q1049803|lt=Ako Line}} of {{ill|West Japan Railway Company|en|West Japan Railway Company|WD=Q502125|lt=JR West}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Yamato-Saidaiji Station|en|Yamato-Saidaiji Station|WD=Q489786|lt=Yamato-Saidaiji Station}} - A station in Nara City, served by the {{ill|Nara Line (Kintetsu)|en|Nara Line (Kintetsu)|WD=Q692386|lt=Kintetsu Nara Line}}, {{ill|Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)|en|Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)|WD=Q1057349|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line}}, and {{ill|Kashihara Line|en|Kashihara Line|WD=Q2491066|lt=Kintetsu Kashihara Line}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|ja|西大寺町・岡山芸術創造劇場ハレノワ前停留場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji-cho/Okayama Art Creation Theater Harenowa-mae Stop|1=Saidaiji-cho Okayama Arts and Crafts Theater Harenowa-mae Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627558}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja|岡山電気軌道東山線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Electric Tramway Higashiyama Line|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 岡山電気軌道東山本線|1=Higashiyama Main Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472771}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|ja|新西大寺町筋停留場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shin-Saidaiji-cho-suji Stop|1=Shin-saidaizi-cho-suzi Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11504058}} - A tram stop on the {{ill|Seikibashi Line|en|Seikibashi Line|WD=Q11472773|lt=Okayama Electric Tramway Seikibashi Line}} in Kita-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Railway|ja|西大寺鉄道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Railway|1=Saidaiji Railway|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627561}} - A former railway company in Okayama Prefecture.
== Facilities == * {{ill|Saidaiji Interchange|ja|西大寺インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Interchange|1=Okayama Blue Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472058}} - An interchange on the {{ill|Okayama Blue Line|ja|岡山ブルーライン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Blue Line|1=Okayama Blue Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472058}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Post Office|ja|西大寺郵便局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Post Office|1=Saidaiji Post Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627560}} - A post office in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|ja|岡山県立西大寺高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|1=Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472340}} - A high school in Higashi-ku, Okayama.

Currently, it includes {{ill|Kannon-in|en|Kannon-in|WD=Q3192708|lt=Kannon-in}} and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|en|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|WD=Q10389102|lt=Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha}} temple in {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|en|Takaoka, Toyama|WD=Q502988|lt=Takaoka City}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|en|Shingon Buddhism|WD=Q550182|lt=Shingon Buddhism}} temple in {{ill|Higashikushira, Kagoshima|en|Higashikushira, Kagoshima|WD=Q1206619|lt=Higashikushira Town}}, {{ill|Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|en|Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|WD=Q1043823|lt=Kimotsuki District}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|en|Kagoshima Prefecture|WD=Q15701|lt=Kagoshima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Sai-ji|en|Sai-ji|WD=Q135714|lt=Saiji (Kyoto)}} - A former temple in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City}}, also known as {{ill|Sai-ji|en|Sai-ji|WD=Q135714|lt=Saiji}}.
== Place Names == * Place names in {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja|岡山市東区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Higashi-ku, Okayama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 東区 (岡山市)|1=Higashi-ku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855491}}: ** {{ill|Saidaiji Area|ja|西大寺地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Area|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627551}} - The jurisdictional area under Okayama City Higashi Ward. Broadly known as Saidaiji, formerly {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}}. ** {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}} - A region within the above area, including the central city area. Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. ** A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627559}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|1=Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q23998042}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Village|1=Saidaiji Village|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627556}} - Disambiguation page.

== Facilities == * {{ill|Saidaiji Interchange|ja|西大寺インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Interchange|1=Okayama Blue Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472058}} - An interchange on the {{ill|Okayama Blue Line|ja|岡山ブルーライン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Blue Line|1=Okayama Blue Line|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472058}}, located in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Saidaiji Post Office|ja|西大寺郵便局|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Post Office|1=Saidaiji Post Office|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627560}} - A post office in Higashi-ku, Okayama. * {{ill|Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|ja|岡山県立西大寺高等学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|1=Okayama Prefectural Saidaiji High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11472340}} - A high school in Higashi-ku, Okayama.

Narrowly referred to as Saidaiji. ** A large district within the above area. See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627559}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|1=Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q23998042}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Village|1=Saidaiji Village|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627556}} - Disambiguation page.

See {{ill|Saidaiji (School District)|ja|西大寺 (学区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (School District)|1=Saidaiji (School District)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627548}}. * A place name in the {{ill|Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja|伏見地域|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fushimi Area (Nara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji City|ja|西大寺市|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji City|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q104519211}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. * {{ill|Saidaiji Town|ja|西大寺町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town|1=Saidaiji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627559}} - A former municipality in Okayama Prefecture. ** {{ill|Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|ja|西大寺町 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|1=Saidaiji Town (Disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q23998042}} - Disambiguation page. * {{ill|Saidaiji Village|ja|西大寺村|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji Village|1=Saidaiji Village|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627556}} - Disambiguation page.

== Temples == * {{ill|Saidai-ji|en|Saidai-ji|WD=Q1203935|lt=Saidaiji (Nara)|1=Saidai-ji}} - A temple in {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara|1=Nara Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}. The head temple of the {{ill|Shingon Risshu|en|Shingon Risshu|WD=Q580527|lt=Shingon Risshu sect|1=Shingon Risshu}} and one of the {{ill|Nanto Shichi Daiji|en|Nanto Shichi Daiji|WD=Q1131210|lt=Seven Great Temples of Nanto|1=Nanto Shichi Daiji}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|1=Saidai-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|WD=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama City|1=Okayama}}, {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|en|Higashi-ku, Okayama|WD=Q855491|lt=Higashi-ku, Okayama|1=Higashi-ku, Okayama}}. A special head temple of the {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357|lt=Koyasan Shingon-shu|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}}, known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes {{ill|Kannon-in|en|Kannon-in|WD=Q3192708|lt=Kannon-in|1=Kannon-in}} and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|en|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|WD=Q10389102|lt=Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha|1=Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha}} temple in {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|en|Takaoka, Toyama|WD=Q502988|lt=Takaoka City|1=Takaoka, Toyama}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture|1=Toyama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|en|Shingon Buddhism|WD=Q550182|lt=Shingon Buddhism|1=Shingon Buddhism}} temple in {{ill|Higashikushira, Kagoshima|en|Higashikushira, Kagoshima|WD=Q1206619|lt=Higashikushira Town|1=Higashikushira, Kagoshima}}, {{ill|Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|en|Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|WD=Q1043823|lt=Kimotsuki District|1=Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|en|Kagoshima Prefecture|WD=Q15701|lt=Kagoshima Prefecture|1=Kagoshima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Sai-ji|en|Sai-ji|WD=Q135714|lt=Saiji (Kyoto)|1=Sai-ji}} - A former temple in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City|1=Kyoto}}, also known as {{ill|Sai-ji|en|Sai-ji|WD=Q135714|lt=Saiji|1=Sai-ji}}.

'''Saidaiji Temple''' '''Saidaiji''' (西大寺)
== Temples == * {{ill|Saidai-ji|en|Saidai-ji|WD=Q1203935|lt=Saidaiji (Nara)|1=Saidai-ji}} - A temple in {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara|1=Nara Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City|1=Nara (city)}}. The head temple of the {{ill|Shingon Risshu|en|Shingon Risshu|WD=Q580527|lt=Shingon Risshu sect|1=Shingon Risshu}} and one of the {{ill|Nanto Shichi Daiji|en|Nanto Shichi Daiji|WD=Q1131210|lt=Seven Great Temples of Nanto|1=Nanto Shichi Daiji}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Okayama)|ja|西大寺 (岡山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Okayama)|1=Saidai-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11627549}} - A temple in {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|WD=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Okayama|en|Okayama|WD=Q200078|lt=Okayama City|1=Okayama}}, {{ill|Higashi-ku, Okayama|en|Higashi-ku, Okayama|WD=Q855491|lt=Higashi-ku, Okayama|1=Higashi-ku, Okayama}}. A special head temple of the {{ill|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|en|Kōyasan Shingon-shū|WD=Q3077357|lt=Koyasan Shingon-shu|1=Kōyasan Shingon-shū}}, known for the "{{ill|Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja|会陽（裸祭）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eyo (Hadaka Matsuri)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." Currently, it includes {{ill|Kannon-in|en|Kannon-in|WD=Q3192708|lt=Kannon-in|1=Kannon-in}} and {{ill|Fumonbo Enman-in|ja|普門坊円満院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fumonbo Enman-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja|西大寺 (高岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Takaoka)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A {{ill|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|en|Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha|WD=Q10389102|lt=Jodo Shinshu Honganji-ha|1=Jodo Shinshu Hongwanji-ha}} temple in {{ill|Takaoka, Toyama|en|Takaoka, Toyama|WD=Q502988|lt=Takaoka City|1=Takaoka, Toyama}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture|1=Toyama Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja|西大寺 (東串良町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saidaiji (Higashikushira)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A {{ill|Shingon Buddhism|en|Shingon Buddhism|WD=Q550182|lt=Shingon Buddhism|1=Shingon Buddhism}} temple in {{ill|Higashikushira, Kagoshima|en|Higashikushira, Kagoshima|WD=Q1206619|lt=Higashikushira Town|1=Higashikushira, Kagoshima}}, {{ill|Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|en|Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima|WD=Q1043823|lt=Kimotsuki District|1=Kimotsuki District, Kagoshima}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|en|Kagoshima Prefecture|WD=Q15701|lt=Kagoshima Prefecture|1=Kagoshima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Sai-ji|en|Sai-ji|WD=Q135714|lt=Saiji (Kyoto)|1=Sai-ji}} - A former temple in {{ill|Kyoto|en|Kyoto|WD=Q34600|lt=Kyoto City|1=Kyoto}}, also known as {{ill|Sai-ji|en|Sai-ji|WD=Q135714|lt=Saiji|1=Sai-ji}}.
